temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) In a dimly lit, dilapidated room, a shirtless man with dark hair frantically bangs his head against a peeling, brick-patterned wall. He is wearing dark pants and a white towel around his waist. He screams in anguish as he pounds on the wall, his movements desperate and violent. (Storyline: This opening scene immediately establishes a character in a state of extreme distress and desperation, creating immediate tension and mystery about his situation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Desperate, anguished, and panicked. 2) Background sounds or music: Loud, frantic banging sounds and a tense, ominous musical score begins to build.)
(00:04-00:06) The camera angle shifts to a high-angle, top-down view, revealing the man is in a small, dark, and dirty room. He continues to bang his head against the wall, his silhouette barely visible in the dim light. The room appears to be a small, confined space. (Storyline: This shot reinforces the character's imprisonment or confinement, showing him trapped in a small, oppressive space. His desperation is still palpable.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Continued screaming and desperation. 2) Background sounds or music: The sound of banging continues, mixed with the tense, dramatic score.)
